title: SecretError: retry semantics not documented on the type
description: Backend means 'permanent — do not retry' and Unavailable means 'transient — retry may succeed'. This convention is documented in CLAUDE.md for backend implementers but NOT in the SecretError enum doc comments for callers of get()/put()/refresh(). A caller who imports SecretError and matches on it has no way to know whether Backend should trigger a retry or a circuit break. The fix is to add retry-semantics guidance to the Backend and Unavailable doc comments.
